markets.notes: Extremely strong STL market. Entry 053 (Chun, NE2 1NQ): £1,940/mo net, 72% occ, £167 ADR.
One of UK's best STL markets. Year-round demand. York Christmas Market (Nov-Dec) generates peak revenue. Entry 064 (Abby Thomas, YO24): £2,115/mo net.
Premium spa/conference market. Harrogate Convention Centre. Entry 014 (Andrew McIntee, HG2): £26k net annual. Entry 034 (Taj Khan, HG1): converted.
Strong year-round demand. Bedminster (BS3) benefits from university area and creative district. Entry 058 (Martyn De Vere, BS3 1AE): £2,080/mo net, 67% occ.
Strong multi-bedroom demand. B12 (Balsall Heath) good for contractors. B36 large properties. Entry 059 (Shahid, B36): £4,088/mo net 6-bed.
Underrated market. Entry 053 area. Entry 056 (Afnan Hassan, HU5): £1,400/mo net projection.
Strong multi-bed demand. CV3 (Don Yoo): 5-bed £1,805/mo. CV6 (Prakash): 4-bed £25,200 annual.
Entry 007 (Karan, DE1): 5-bed £24,205 annual. Entry 043 (Joseph, Derby): £1,600/mo net.
HITRANS/Teesworks-driven contractor demand. Entry 004 (Robert, DL1): £14,400 annual.
Strong city centre and suburban demand. Stayful core operational area.
90-night annual cap in many London boroughs without planning permission. Entry 016 (Ihsan, EC4M) and entry 006 (Elliot, W4) both in London.
markets.regulatory_note: 90-night STL cap applies unless planning permission for short lets obtained. Must confirm with lead before proceeding.

markets.notes: Alton Towers proximity creates October half-term spike. Entry 062 (Kuldip, ST1): October = £1,928 net.
Entry 052 (Mandi, SE25): Crystal Palace FC (Selhurst Park) = strong weekend demand. NHS/healthcare workers as weekday guest type.
Entry 055 (Rona, PR4 2BF Kirkham): Ribby Hall holiday village creates overflow demand. 6+ parking spaces = strong USP.
